Required Evidence or Action: Acquire or monitor coroner, SAPOL, or FSSA determination.
Boundary Condition: Do not state official closure until official record is acquired.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire technical laboratory report, chain of custody, match methodology, or official forensic report.
Boundary Condition: Do not substitute public summaries for full methodology.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire full autopsy, toxicology, laboratory notes, and expert review.
Boundary Condition: Do not infer agent or mechanism from negative common-poison testing.

Required Evidence or Action: Locate property notes, official transcript pages, and exhibit custody record.
Boundary Condition: Do not infer finder or timing without source.

Required Evidence or Action: Locate police file, exhibit photographs, paper/print test results, and archive correspondence.
Boundary Condition: Do not treat recovery narrative as closed without custody record.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire witness transcripts, scene photographs, scene reports, and pathology review.
Boundary Condition: Do not merge witness observations into certain identity or exact TOD.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire cloakroom records, property notes, and exhibit chain.
Boundary Condition: Do not move from association to ownership or depositor identity without source.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire high-resolution garment photographs and textile/exhibit reports.
Boundary Condition: Do not infer motive, actor, or timing from label absence alone.

Required Evidence or Action: Query archive, police historical, museum, and coroner holdings.
Boundary Condition: Do not assume destruction unless official record supports it.

Required Evidence or Action: Conduct documented archive searches with reproducible terms and record sets.
Boundary Condition: Do not convert historical plausibility into case proof.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire high-quality images and commission document/cryptanalytic review.
Boundary Condition: Do not present a plaintext or function without accepted evidence.

Required Evidence or Action: Acquire ticket statements, transport timetables, and transport records.
Boundary Condition: Do not identify purchaser or route beyond source precision.

Required Evidence or Action: Use later commentary only to locate leads after primary sources are exhausted.
Boundary Condition: Do not cite commentary as primary evidence.
